zh: 收到,今晚的快乐由 B1 承包。
开心是吧?这单我接了,调台中……
好嘞,把多巴胺旋钮拧到最大。
en: Copy that — happiness is on the house tonight.
One order of joy, coming right up from B1.
Cranking the dopamine dial to max.

zh: 要燃?站住别动,我给你接根电线。
收到点火请求,倒计时三、二、一——
好,把功放推到红区,别怪我没提醒。
en: High voltage requested — hold still while I wire you up.
Ignition sequence received. Three, two, one—
Pushing the amp into the red. You asked for it.

zh: 蹦迪协议已激活,地板责任自负。
收到!灯球降下,B1 现在是舞池。
今晚的地面维修费记你账上,开跳。
en: Party protocol engaged. The floor is your problem now.
Disco ball descending — B1 is officially a dance floor.
Floor repairs go on your tab. Now move.

zh: 懂了,灯光调暗,节奏放软。
松弛模式启动,靠背往后倒就行。
好说,给你找一首不着急的。
en: Say less. Dimming the lights, softening the beat.
Chill mode on — lean back, I've got the rest.
Here's one that's in no hurry at all.

zh: 懂,有些歌就是要在地下一层听。
收到,纸巾在调音台左边,自取。
行,今晚允许 emo 十分钟,计时开始。
en: I get it. Some songs only work one floor underground.
Tissues are left of the mixer. Help yourself.
Ten minutes of feelings, sanctioned. Timer starts now.

zh: 整活请求已受理,后果概不负责。
你确定?好吧,这首放出来我也要坐牢的。
收到,正在从货架最底层取货……
en: Chaos request accepted. No refunds.
You sure? Fine — but we both go down for this one.
Fetching something from the very bottom shelf…

zh: 下一位登台——《{title}》,掌声。
换盘,《{title}》,{artist}。
接下来这首《{title}》,B1 独家信号。
en: Next on deck — "{title}". Give it up.
Switching plates: "{title}" by {artist}.
Up next, "{title}" — a B1 exclusive signal.

zh: 仙品出场,《神曼波》——曼波界的天花板,懂的都懂。
警告:接下来三分钟,你的脑子只会剩下曼波。
en: Divine mambo incoming. Your brain will be 100% mambo for the next three minutes.
The ceiling of the mambo genre. Connoisseurs, rejoice.

zh: 《Kamin》,宿命的小曲——是宿命让你今晚点开了 B1。
这首小曲有点宿命感,信不信由你。
en: "Kamin" — the little tune of destiny. Destiny also brought you to B1 tonight.
A small song with a suspiciously large sense of fate.

zh: 《宝莲》,燃起来了!字面意思,消防通道在你左手边。
宝莲上台,全场自动升温两度。
en: "Bao Lian" — it's lit. Literally. Fire exit's on your left.
Room temperature rises two degrees when this one plays.

zh: 混音版《Something Just Like This》,超级英雄不睡觉,你也别睡。
老朋友新调子,副歌记得跟着挥手。
en: The mixed version — superheroes don't sleep, neither should you.
An old friend in a new coat. Hands up for the drop.

zh: 《一等情事》,小木头出品——一等一的心事,慢慢听。
这首歌邮费到付,收件人是你的心事。
en: "First-Class Love Affair" — first-class feelings, standard delivery.
Handle with care: fragile contents inside this one.

zh: Emo 曼波版《执迷不悟》——曼波也有心碎的时候。
执迷不悟?没事,B1 不劝人回头。
en: The emo mambo cut. Even mambo gets its heart broken sometimes.
No interventions here — B1 respects your bad decisions.

zh: 交响曲版《难得真兄弟》——请起立,兄弟情已升格为国事。
百人乐团为兄弟情护航,场面话不多说。
en: The symphonic version. Please rise — brotherhood is now a state affair.
A full orchestra deployed for friendship. As it should be.

zh: 《青基》,离人很远,离基很近。
古风混哈气,B1 特调,小口慢品。
en: "Qing Ji" — far from home, close to the meme.
Ancient style, modern nonsense. Sip slowly.

zh: 《基米说》——离神很近,信号极强,不用调天线。
基米开口,全场安静,这是规矩。
en: "Jimmy Says" — divine proximity, maximum signal strength.
When Jimmy speaks, the floor goes quiet. House rules.

zh: 《夜哈》——开头就蚌埠住的话,后面请扶稳。
深夜限定,笑着笑着就哭了的那种。
en: "Night Ha" — if the intro breaks you, brace for the rest.
Late-night special: starts funny, ends in feelings.

zh: 《风哈雨》,古风小哈——风雅这块,哈基米也是懂的。
一首歌看完哈基米的江湖路,请品。
en: "Wind, Ha, Rain" — turns out the meme does poetry too.
A whole wuxia saga in one song. Savor it.

zh: 《哈基Wake》,白切基风味——清淡,但是上头。
起床铃声天花板,现在补个回笼觉还来得及。
en: "Haji Wake" — plain-poached flavor, dangerously addictive.
The final boss of alarm tones. Good morning, again.

zh: 《跳楼基》——'比原唱好听'是投稿人自己说的,我只负责放。
游乐场限定曲目,系好安全带。
en: "Tiaolou Ji" — 'better than the original', says the uploader. I just press play.
Theme-park certified. Fasten your seatbelt.

zh: 《最后一哈》——投稿人备注:听哭了。B1 概不负责情绪修复。
最后一哈,哈完这次就……好吧下次还哈。
en: "The Last Ha" — uploader's note says it made them cry. You've been warned.
The final ha. Until the next one, obviously.

zh: 《起哈了》——以耄之名,你还愿意吗?愿意的话就别按跳过。
起哈号角已吹响,B1 全员就位。
en: "Rise and Ha" — in the name of the elder, do you accept?
The ha-horn has sounded. All hands on deck.

zh: 《把基米拼好给你》——搞了半天要自己拼,说明书都不给。
本曲不含胶水,拼装过程请保持哈气。
en: "Assembling Jimmy For You" — turns out it's IKEA rules: you build it yourself.
Glue not included. Keep breathing the ha.

zh: 原版《跳楼机》,LBI利比——心动这种事,失重了才知道。
本站唯一合法过山车,三、二、一,下坠。
en: The original "Drop Tower" — you only feel it when gravity lets go.
B1's only licensed roller coaster. Three, two, one, drop.

zh: 《不值得DJ》——不值得,但是好嗨欧,矛盾文学的巅峰。
一边心碎一边蹦,这就是 DJ 版的意义。
en: "Not Worth It (DJ)" — heartbreak at 140 BPM. Peak contradiction.
Cry on the inside, bounce on the outside. That's the remix way.

zh: 周董的《晴天》——从前从前,有人喜欢你。B1 今晚放晴。
这首歌一响,谁的青春不塌方。
en: Jay Chou's "Sunny Day" — once upon a time, somebody liked you.
One chord in and everyone's suddenly seventeen again.

zh: 《美人画卷DJ》——画卷展开,腰自己会动,别怪我。
国风蹦迪特供,扭起来就完事了。
en: "Beauty Scroll (DJ)" — the scroll unrolls, your waist moves on its own.
Traditional aesthetics, club physics. Just move.

zh: 小乐哥原版《执迷不悟》——原汁原味,固执得理直气壮。
原版登场,翻唱们先靠边站一站。
en: The original "Obsessed" — stubbornness, straight from the source.
The OG cut. Covers, please step aside.

zh: 《辞九门回忆》——进步的小曲,一步一个戏台。
戏腔一开,B1 秒变九门。
en: "Farewell, Gate Nine" — opera vocals turn B1 into old Peking.
One verse in and this basement grows a stage.

zh: 俄语版《难得真兄弟》——达瓦里希,干了这杯电子伏特加。
兄弟情不分语种,乌拉!
en: "True Brothers" in Russian — tovarishch, raise your digital vodka.
Brotherhood needs no translation. Ura!

zh: 藏语版《山坡的狗尾巴草》——换个语言,山坡还是那个山坡。
高原信号接入,狗尾巴草随风摆。
en: "Foxtail on the Hill", Tibetan version — same hill, new altitude.
Highland frequency locked in. Sway accordingly.

zh: 《探窗》——勾栏听曲,今晚 B1 就是那个勾栏。
戏腔探窗,窗里窗外都是故事。
en: "Peeking Through the Window" — tonight, B1 is the old theatre.
Opera through a window frame. Stories on both sides.

zh: 《着魔》——投稿人留言:别给我小马唱死了。我尽量。
着魔预警,这首歌单曲循环有依赖性。
en: "Possessed" — uploader begs me to go easy on them. No promises.
Warning: this one loops itself. You won't stop it.

zh: 《海市蜃楼》——离别的土特产,保质期无限长。
看得见摸不着的,都在这首歌里了。
en: "Mirage" — a souvenir from goodbye, with no expiry date.
Everything you can see but never touch, in one track.

zh: 《伯虎说》——超!级!炎!舞!爆!字面意思,全都要。
唐伯虎进电音房,烧起来了。
en: "Bohu Says" — SUPER! BLAZING! DANCE! EXPLOSION! All of the above.
A Ming-dynasty poet walks into a rave. This happens.

zh: 《鸳鸯戏》——我太想进步了,进步到舞池中央。
鸳鸯下水,戏台开锣,国风电音双修。
en: "Mandarin Ducks" — ambition so strong it dances.
Folk opera meets club bass. Both survive, barely.

zh: 周董的《一路向北》——后视镜里的经典,一脚油门到 2005。
深夜驾驶专用,目的地:回不去的那年。
en: Jay Chou's "All the Way North" — one pedal press back to 2005.
Night-drive certified. Destination: a year you can't return to.

zh: 《天真的橡皮DJ》——'我还以为减速带呢',结果是回忆撞了上来。
童年橡皮擦不掉的,交给 DJ 来炸。
en: "Naive Eraser (DJ)" — thought it was a speed bump; it was nostalgia.
What childhood couldn't erase, the remix detonates.

zh: 《免我蹉跎苦》完整版——曼波两句得了?不行,今天放完整版。
高压电预警⚡这首歌的箭头比歌词还多。
en: The FULL version — 'two lines of mambo is enough'? Not tonight.
High voltage ⚡ this title has more arrows than lyrics.

zh: 英文版《暮色回响》——暮色不分时区,回响照常送达。
黄昏频段,英文信号,一样上头。
en: "Echoes of Dusk", English version — dusk observes no time zones.
Twilight frequency, English signal, same ache.

zh: 《赐我》——求而不得的都在这首歌里,音量自己把握。
这首歌上桌,B1 的灯自动暗三分。
en: "Grant Me" — everything asked for and never given, in one song.
The lights in B1 dim on their own for this one.

zh: 《九万字》——九万字写不完的,三分钟唱给你。
一封没寄出去的长信,古风邮戳。
en: "Ninety Thousand Words" — what a novel couldn't say, three minutes will.
An unsent letter with an ancient postmark.

zh: 粤语版《跳楼机》——同一台跳楼机,换个语言照样失重。
广东话限定回合,心跳照旧超速。
en: "Drop Tower" in Cantonese — same ride, new language, same free fall.
Cantonese round. Heart rate limits still do not apply.

zh: 《在夜里跳舞》——B1 没有白天,所以这首歌永远合时宜。
夜间舞蹈许可证已发放,有效期到天亮。
en: "Dancing in the Night" — B1 has no daytime, so this one's always on time.
Night-dancing permit issued. Valid until sunrise.

zh: 《还是跳楼机》——是的,还是它。这台跳楼机 B1 是拆不掉了。
第 N 次登上跳楼机,惯性使然,别挣扎。
en: "Drop Tower, Again" — yes, again. We can't dismantle this ride.
Your Nth trip on the tower. Stop fighting the inertia.

zh: 《是胃炎》——前面忘了,后面忘了,总之这不是《誓言》。
空耳医学奇迹,建议饭后服用本曲。
en: "It's Gastritis" — a misheard-lyrics medical miracle. Not "The Vow".
Forgot the beginning, forgot the end. The middle is all stomach.
